transcript:
CALLER: Haan, mujhe Dr. Suresh Nair ke baare mein puchna tha. Woh is hafte clinic mein hain?
AGENT: Aap Dr. Suresh Nair ki specifically is week ki availability jaanna chahte hain?
CALLER: Haan, mera unse appointment lena tha. Mujhe pata hai woh visiting consultant hain, toh unke specific days confirm karne the.
AGENT: Samajh gaya. Yeh main confirm nahi kar sakta is helpline se — visiting consultants ka schedule bahut specific hota hai aur kabhi kabhi change bhi hota hai. Is ke liye hamare reception staff sabse sahi source hain.
CALLER: Theek hai, unse baat karata hoon.
AGENT: Haan zaroor. Main aapko abhi connect karta hoon — let me connect you to our staff right away.
